premise: My sister forged my signature on a quitclaim deed for the $285,000 condo our aunt left me, rented it out, and pocketed $40,000 in rent while I unknowingly paid the mortgage. I moved back in the day the lease ended, changed the locks, and sued for fraud — the court awarded me triple damages and I put a lien on her house.

thumb.label: Thumbnail + metadata
thumb.detail: My Sister Forged My Signature, Stole My Condo, And Rented It Out. So I Let Her L
